data.title: Pantheon Resources Advances with Alaska LNG Pipeline Support
data.description:
Pantheon Resources (GB:PANR) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Pantheon Resources is making strides in Alaska’s energy sector with the Alaska Gasline Development Corporation’s recent support for the FEED funding of the Alaska LNG Phase 1 pipeline. This development is crucial for securing private investment and moving towards a Final Investment Decision, potentially enabling Pantheon to fund its Ahpun oil field project until it achieves cash-flow self-sufficiency. The strategic location of Pantheon’s assets offers a competitive edge with reduced development times and costs.

data.title: Orbital Corporation Announces Entitlement Offer Success
data.description:
Orbital Corporation Limited (AU:OEC) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Orbital Corporation Ltd successfully closed its renounceable entitlement offer, raising A$1.24 million as shareholders snapped up 61.7% of the available shares. The offer, fully underwritten by UIL Limited and Boneyard Investments Pty Ltd, saw major shareholders and directors taking up their full entitlements. New shares are set to be issued shortly, promising equal standing with existing ones.

data.title: Smiths Group plc Announces Share Buyback Strategy
data.description:
Smiths Group plc (GB:SMIN) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Smiths Group plc has repurchased a total of 30,000 ordinary shares from J.P. Morgan Securities on the London Stock Exchange, with prices ranging between 1,741 GBp and 1,786 GBp. This move is part of the company’s ongoing share buyback program, aiming to enhance shareholder value by canceling the repurchased shares. Investors should note the impact of such buybacks on share liquidity and potential stock price adjustments.
